Our founder runs a hyperbaric clinic and uses these chambers every day

Thrive founder David Gumbleton runs a hyperbaric clinic in the UK, including chambers used by elite athletes. The advice you get is from someone who operates one. Thrive installs HPO.TECH chambers worldwide.

  • One point of contact from specification through to commissioning.
  • We help you set up how it gets used, and train whoever runs it.
  • As the official HPO.TECH worldwide specialist, we get you the chamber at manufacturer prices - our help costs you nothing extra.

Explore sports
What the system delivers

How much oxygen you actually get at 2.4 ATA

A chamber can reach 2.4 ATA and still not deliver what the studies delivered. The published protocols used 100% oxygen through a mask at 2.0 to 2.4 ATA, and matching that takes three things: the pressure, a built-in breathing system that seals properly, and enough flow - 20 litres a minute - to keep the mask supplied while you breathe from it. HPO.TECH builds all three into every chamber. Plenty of chambers on the market hit the pressure and fall short on the other two, and you won't see it on the spec sheet.

See the science Read the buying guide
Oxygen delivery
Dissolved oxygen in plasma up to 12345 mL per 100 mL plasma · at 2.4 ATA
Delivered pressure2.0–2.4 ATA
Oxygen flow rate20 L/min
BIBS mask → inhaled oxygen concentrationUp to 100%

Follow us on Instagram

Cleared for medical use in Saudi Arabia & the UAE

Every HPO.TECH system holds full marketing authorisation from the Saudi Food & Drug Authority (SFDA) and is registered with the UAE Ministry of Health and Prevention (MOHAP).

See our certifications

Start by telling us about the room

Most conversations start with a photo of the space and a rough idea of who will use it. We take it from there: 3D model, equipment, timeline, installation. If a chamber isn't right for you, we'll say so.
